name: session-metrics
description: Parses Claude Code JSONL logs to produce per-turn token/cost/cache breakdowns. Multi-format export (text/JSON/CSV/MD/HTML) with 5-hour session blocks, weekly roll-up, session duration & burn rate, hour-of-day + weekday punchcard, and pluggable chart libraries (Highcharts/uPlot/Chart.js/none). Zero network at runtime, stdlib-only Python.
